case_title: CARLA CUPIT VS. GAIL ANTOINETTE DONEHUE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-09-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
